citation: Constantini et al. 2026, Supplementary Data Sheets (Axiom Vitis22K)
platform: Affymetrix Axiom Vitis22K SNP array (PN40024 T2T reference)
access_method: XLSX Sup. Table 6 provided by user (Data Sheet/Sup. Table 6.xlsx)
notes: 145 samples × 10,484 SNPs; dosage calls AA/AB/BB. Includes Cab Sauv, Chardonnay, Muscat, Pinot Noir, Cab Franc, Merlot. Sup Table 8 provides chloroplastic SNPs + maternal lineage validation for the same panel.
